Suicide.description: Score penalty applied when a player kills themselves

PlayerKill.description: Score awarded for killing another player

PlayerKillPercent.description: Percentage of victim score transferred to killer on player kill

MonsterKill.description: Score awarded for killing a monster in arena mode

PlayerDeath.description: Score penalty applied when a player is killed by another player

PlayerDeathPercent.description: Percentage of score lost when killed by another player

MonsterDeath.description: Score penalty applied when killed by a monster in arena mode
